skills.name: Bajiquan
skills.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy.

skills.name: Jeweled Sword Zelretch
skills.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy.

skills.name: An Gal Ta Ki Gal Šè
skills.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy, and Quantum DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to other enemy targets. When used, recovers **4[i]** Skill Point(s) for allies, and increases the DMG taken by all enemies by ****5[i]%****, lasting for **6[i]** turn(s).

skills.name: Gem Magecraft
skills.description: When entering combat, gains **1[i]** "Gem Energy." When an ally target consumes or recovers Skill Points, increases their CRIT DMG by ****3[i]%**** for **2[i]** turn(s). For every 1 Skill Point consumed or recovered, Rin Tohsaka gains 1 "Gem Energy." If Rin Tohsaka holds **5[i]** or more "Gem Energy," or if the current Skill Points are **4[i]** or more, her Skill is enhanced to "Second Magic Experiment."

skills.name: Freeform Tohsaka Style
skills.description: After **Archer** uses his Skill "Caladbolg II: Fake Spiral Sword" to attack, if Skill Points are **3[i]** or fewer or if "Caladbolg II: Fake Spiral Sword" has been actively used 5 times during the current "Circuit Connection" state, and the **Joint Follow-Up ATK** from "Freeform Tohsaka Style" has not been triggered, Rin Tohsaka and **Archer** will launch **Joint Follow-Up ATK** on all enemies, dealing Quantum DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK and ****4[i]%**** of **Archer**'s ATK respectively, and recovering **2[i]** Skill Point(s) for allies. This **Joint Follow-Up ATK** can only trigger once. The trigger count resets when Rin Tohsaka's turn ends.

skills.name: Attack
skills.description: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

skills.name: Conversion Charge
skills.description: After using Technique, gains **1[i]** "Gem Energy" at the start of the next battle.

skills.name: Second Magic Experiment
skills.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to all enemies. Then, consumes **2[i]** "Gem Energy" to additionally deal Quantum DMG equal to ****3[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one random enemy target. This repeats until "Gem Energy" is less than **2[i]** or there are no enemy targets with current HP greater than 0. Can repeat up to **6[i]** cycle(s). When used, if the current Skill Points are greater than **4[i]**, consumes Skill Points down to **4[i]**, and for each Point consumed, immediately gains **5[i]** "Gem Energy."

tree.name: Bajiquan
tree.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy.

tree.name: Jeweled Sword Zelretch
tree.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy.

tree.name: <unbreak>An Gal Ta</unbreak> <unbreak>Ki Gal Šè</unbreak>
tree.description: Deals Quantum DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy, and Quantum DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to other enemy targets. When used, recovers **4[i]** Skill Point(s) for allies, and increases the DMG taken by all enemies by ****5[i]%****, lasting for **6[i]** turn(s).

tree.name: Gem Magecraft
tree.description: When entering combat, gains **1[i]** "Gem Energy." When an ally target consumes or recovers Skill Points, increases their CRIT DMG by ****3[i]%**** for **2[i]** turn(s). For every 1 Skill Point consumed or recovered, Rin Tohsaka gains 1 "Gem Energy." If Rin Tohsaka holds **5[i]** or more "Gem Energy," or if the current Skill Points are **4[i]** or more, her Skill is enhanced to "Second Magic Experiment."

tree.name: Conversion Charge
tree.description: After using Technique, gains **1[i]** "Gem Energy" at the start of the next battle.

tree.name: Elegant Conduct
tree.description: While Rin Tohsaka is on the field, additionally increases the upper limit of Skill Points by **2**. When entering combat, Rin Tohsaka's ATK increases by **150%**, and Quantum **RES PEN** increases by **15%**. If **Archer** is in the team, **Archer** also gains this effect.

tree.name: Ladylike Poise
tree.description: When entering combat or after using Enhanced Skill, increases Rin Tohsaka's SPD by **20%**, lasting for **3** turn(s).

tree.name: Inbound Prosperity
tree.description: When Rin Tohsaka uses Ultimate, gains **12** "Gem Energy."

ranks.name: Zelretch's Apprentice
ranks.description:
If one instance of the Enhanced Skill consumes **1[i]** or more "Gem Energy," Rin Tohsaka gains "Shadow Gem" equal to the amount of "Gem Energy" consumed.
While holding "Shadow Gem," enhances Skill to "Second Magic Experiment." The Enhanced Skill consumes all "Shadow Gem," does not trigger the effect that converts Skill Points into "Gem Energy," and does not consume "Gem Energy."

ranks.name: Dimensional Traveler
ranks.description: Rin Tohsaka's Skill DMG dealt increases by **1[i]%**. While Rin Tohsaka is on the field, Skill DMG dealt by all allies becomes **2[i]%** of the original DMG.

ranks.name: Holy Grail War: Victory Memorial
ranks.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. **10**.

ranks.name: Red Devil: Triple Speed
ranks.description: When the CRIT DMG boost effect from the Talent "Gem Magecraft" applies to Rin Tohsaka, the effect can stack, up to **1[i]** time(s).

ranks.name: Goddess of Venus's Favor
ranks.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.

ranks.name: Nailed It This Time!
ranks.description: Rin Tohsaka's All-Type **RES PEN** increases by **1[i]%**. When using Ultimate, gains **2[i]** "Gem Energy" and 1 **extra turn**.

skills.name: Halfhearted Blow
skills.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to one designated enemy.

skills.name: Gate of Babylon
skills.description:
Gains "King's Acknowledgement," allowing this unit to ignore ****5[i]%**** of the target's DEF when dealing DMG, lasting for **6[i]** turn(s).
Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Lightning DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to adjacent targets.

skills.name: Enuma Elish
skills.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals **3[i]** instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Lightning DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to one random enemy.

skills.name: "Amuse Me to the Fullest"
skills.description:
When a teammate uses their Ultimate, Gilgamesh gains "King's Burden," which increases Ultimate DMG dealt by this unit by ****3[i]%****, lasting for **1[i]** turn(s).
Initially, automatically uses Basic ATK at the start of this unit's turn. When another ally target takes action, Gilgamesh gains 1 point of "Interest." For each point of "Interest" in possession, increases this unit's SPD by **4[i]%**.
When "Interest" reaches **2[i]** for the first time, enters the "Interest Piqued!" state. In that state, can only use Skill, lasting for the entire battle. After using Skill, clears this unit's "Interest."

skills.name: "I Grant You Permission To Strike"
skills.description:
When Gilgamesh or **Saber** attacks, the attack tally increases by 1. After any unit attacks, if the attack tally reaches **5[i]**, Gilgamesh and **Saber** launch **Joint Follow-Up ATK**, dealing Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK and Wind DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Saber's ATK to all enemies, respectively. Then, Gilgamesh gains **3[i]** "Interest." **Saber** regenerates a fixed **4[i]** Energy, and the next time she uses Ultimate, the DMG dealt becomes ****6[i]%**** of the original DMG.
After using **Joint Follow-Up ATK**, resets the attack tally.

skills.name: Attack
skills.description: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

skills.name: Enkidu
skills.description:
After using Technique, creates 1 Special Dimension lasting for **1[i]** second(s). Enemies in the Special Dimension enter the "King's Permission" state. Enemies in the "King's Permission" state will cease all actions.
When entering combat by actively attacking an enemy in the "King's Permission" state, causes all enemies in the "King's Permission" state to enter combat, and deals Lightning DMG equal to **2[i]%** of Gilgamesh's ATK to all enemies after entering combat. Gilgamesh also immediately gains **3[i]** "Interest." Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.

tree.name: Halfhearted Blow
tree.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to one designated enemy.

tree.name: Gate of Babylon
tree.description:
Gains "King's Acknowledgement," allowing this unit to ignore ****5[i]%**** of the target's DEF when dealing DMG, lasting for **6[i]** turn(s).
Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Lightning DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to adjacent targets.

tree.name: Enuma Elish
tree.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals **3[i]** instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Lightning DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Gilgamesh's ATK to one random enemy.

tree.name: "Amuse Me to the Fullest"

Initially, automatically uses Basic ATK at the start of this unit's turn. When another ally target takes action, Gilgamesh gains 1 point of "Interest." For each point of "Interest" in possession, increases this unit's SPD by **4[i]%**.
When "Interest" reaches **2[i]** for the first time, enters the "Interest Piqued!" state. In that state, can only use Skill, lasting for the entire battle. After using Skill, clears this unit's "Interest."

tree.name: Enkidu
tree.description:
After using Technique, creates 1 Special Dimension lasting for **1[i]** second(s). Enemies in the Special Dimension enter the "King's Permission" state. Enemies in the "King's Permission" state will cease all actions.
When entering combat by actively attacking an enemy in the "King's Permission" state, causes all enemies in the "King's Permission" state to enter combat, and deals Lightning DMG equal to **2[i]%** of Gilgamesh's ATK to all enemies after entering combat. Gilgamesh also immediately gains **3[i]** "Interest." Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.

tree.name: Epic's Opening
tree.description: When Gilgamesh uses Ultimate, gains **2** "Interest." When other ally characters use Ultimate, Gilgamesh additionally gains **2** "Interest" and regenerates a fixed amount of Energy equal to **30%** of the Energy consumed this time.

tree.name: Hero's Hauteur
tree.description: During the current battle, for every 1 point of "Interest" gained by Gilgamesh, increases his CRIT DMG by **25%**. This effect can stack up to **6** time(s).

tree.name: Hegemon's Strife
tree.description: While Gilgamesh is on the field, increases all ally targets' ATK by **20%** and CRIT DMG by **20%**. If the target's Max Energy exceeds **140**, for every 1 excess point of Max Energy, additionally increases ATK and CRIT DMG by **1%**, up to a maximum additional increase of **100%**.

ranks.name: He Who Saw the Deep
ranks.description: When Gilgamesh holds "King's Acknowledgement," its DEF-ignoring effect also applies to other teammates, and "King's Acknowledgement" additionally increases Gilgamesh's ATK by **1[i]%**. When using Skill, additionally regenerates a fixed **2[i]** Energy.

ranks.name: Wisdom That Encompassed All
ranks.description: When entering combat, Gilgamesh gains **1[i]** "Interest." When using Ultimate, additionally gains **2[i]** "Interest." The DMG multiplier of the Skill "Gate of Babylon" against the primary target increases by **3[i]%**, and its DMG multiplier against adjacent targets increases by **4[i]%**.

ranks.name: Journey That Spanned Far
ranks.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. **10**.

ranks.name: Sword That Parted Gods from Man
ranks.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.

ranks.name: Soul That Bore Friendship
ranks.description: Increases the bounce DMG multiplier of the Ultimate "Enuma Elish" by **1[i]%**. While Gilgamesh is on the field, increases ally characters' All-Type **RES PEN** by **2[i]%**. When a teammate uses Ultimate, Gilgamesh gains 1 point of "Golden Rule," up to a total of **3[i]** points. When this unit uses Ultimate, consumes all "Golden Rule" points, and each point of "Golden Rule" consumed increases the CRIT DMG for the Ultimate DMG dealt by **4[i]%**.

avatar.name: Himeko • Nova
avatar.description:
Some fight side by side, some keep watch. The Trailblaze is never a lonely voyage.
She paints a trailblazing miracle. The silver rail stretches on, and the Nameless set sail once more, illuminating the galaxy's eternal night.
At the end of the line, she looks back once again. The dream of setting forth has never run aground.

skills.name: Enkindle the First Lodestar
skills.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one enemy.

skills.name: Upraise the Vanward Cresset
skills.description: After using Skill, immediately recovers all **Assist Skill** uses. Himeko • Nova gains "Navigator's Semaphore," lasting for **2[i]** turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Himeko • Nova's every turn. When Himeko • Nova has "Navigator's Semaphore," DMG dealt by all allies increases by ****1[i]%****. At the start of every turn, immediately recovers 1 **Assist Skill** use.

skills.name: We, Too, Stride the Stars
skills.description:
Immediately takes control of "Starblazer." "Starblazer" can launch "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" against enemies 6 times, or consume **"Source Energy"** to launch "Orbital Annihilation Pulse," dealing Fire DMG up to ****9[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one designated enemy, and Fire DMG up to ****10[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to other targets.
When the uses of "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" are depleted, automatically launches "Orbital Annihilation Pulse," followed by Final Hit, dealing **6[i]** instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to ****7[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy.
When "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" or "Orbital Annihilation Pulse" deals fatal damage to all enemies on the field, or when enemy HP can no longer be reduced, immediately launches Final Hit.

skills.name: Of Fire and Far Faring
skills.description:
While Himeko • Nova is on the field, immediately deploys the **Territory** "Starblazer Visioscape," summoning "Starblazer" to the field and granting all ally characters 1 **Assist Skill** use. Ally characters can use **Assist Skill** to call upon "Starblazer" to attack enemies.
Using **Assist Skill** is considered as Himeko • Nova using her Skill. Himeko • Nova gains ****2[i]%**** increased All-Type **RES PEN** and ****1[i]%**** increased CRIT DMG. When attacking, can ignore Weakness Types to reduce enemy Toughness. When breaking Weakness, triggers the Fire Weakness Break effect.
When ally characters other than Himeko • Nova use their **Assist Skill**, regenerates **3[i]** Energy for them.

skills.name: Attack
skills.description: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

skills.name: Starcharter Cruise
skills.description:
When Himeko • Nova is in the team, increases the max Technique Points by 3.
After using Technique, enters the "Cruise" state for **1[i]** seconds. Actively using the Technique consumes 2 Technique Points and immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, immediately uses Skill 1 time at the start of each wave.
If attacking a Normal Enemy, immediately defeats them without entering combat. No Technique Points are consumed if no enemies are hit.

skills.name: Hyperluminal Particle Beam
skills.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to all enemies and gains **2[i]** point(s) of **"Source Energy."** A maximum of **3[i]** **"Source Energy"** can be held.

skills.name: Orbital Annihilation Pulse
skills.description: Consumes 1 point of **"Source Energy"** to deal Fire DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to all enemies. When the current **"Source Energy"** is more than 1, for every **2[i]** point(s) of **"Source Energy"** consumed, additionally deals 1 instance of Fire DMG equal to ****3[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy.

skills.name: Trailblaze, By Your Side
skills.description:
Deals Fire DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals **2[i]** instances of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to ****3[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy. When used by Himeko • Nova, deals Fire DMG equal to ****4[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals **5[i]** instances of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to ****6[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy.
If the user is a **Trailblaze Companions** character other than Himeko • Nova, then depending on the user, Himeko • Nova additionally gains 1 of the ********Special** Effects****.
The extra **Assist Skill** via all ********Special** Effects**** can be launched up to **8[i]** time(s) per battle, and this count is reset after Himeko • Nova uses her Ultimate.

skills.name: Companion Protocol: Verdict
skills.description: Enters the "Companion Protocol: Verdict" state. Increases DMG dealt by Himeko • Nova by ****8[i]%****, and additionally increases her Ultimate DMG dealt by ****10[i]%****. After Himeko • Nova's teammates actively use their Ultimate **9[i]** time(s), Himeko • Nova immediately launches 1 **Assist Skill** against enemies at no cost.

skills.name: Companion Protocol: Decimation
skills.description: Enters the "Companion Protocol: Decimation" state. Increases all allies' CRIT DMG by ****8[i]%****, and additionally increases the CRIT DMG dealt by Skill by ****10[i]%****. For every 1 enemy target hit by allies, gains 1 Charge. When Charge reaches **9[i]**, consumes all Charge, and Himeko • Nova immediately launches 1 **Assist Skill** against enemies at no cost. This instance of **Assist Skill** cannot grant Charge.

tree.name: Enkindle the First Lodestar
tree.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one enemy.

tree.name: Upraise the Vanward Cresset
tree.description: After using Skill, immediately recovers all **Assist Skill** uses. Himeko • Nova gains "Navigator's Semaphore," lasting for **2[i]** turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Himeko • Nova's every turn. When Himeko • Nova has "Navigator's Semaphore," DMG dealt by all allies increases by ****1[i]%****. At the start of every turn, immediately recovers 1 **Assist Skill** use.

Immediately takes control of "Starblazer." "Starblazer" can launch "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" against enemies 6 times, or consume **"Source Energy"** to launch "Orbital Annihilation Pulse," dealing Fire DMG up to ****9[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one designated enemy, and Fire DMG up to ****10[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to other targets.
When the uses of "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" are depleted, automatically launches "Orbital Annihilation Pulse," followed by Final Hit, dealing **6[i]** instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to ****7[i]%**** of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy.
When "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" or "Orbital Annihilation Pulse" deals fatal damage to all enemies on the field, or when enemy HP can no longer be reduced, immediately launches Final Hit.

tree.name: Of Fire and Far Faring
tree.description:
While Himeko • Nova is on the field, immediately deploys the **Territory** "Starblazer Visioscape," summoning "Starblazer" to the field and granting all ally characters 1 **Assist Skill** use. Ally characters can use **Assist Skill** to call upon "Starblazer" to attack enemies.
Using **Assist Skill** is considered as Himeko • Nova using her Skill. Himeko • Nova gains ****2[i]%**** increased All-Type **RES PEN** and ****1[i]%**** increased CRIT DMG. When attacking, can ignore Weakness Types to reduce enemy Toughness. When breaking Weakness, triggers the Fire Weakness Break effect.
When ally characters other than Himeko • Nova use their **Assist Skill**, regenerates **3[i]** Energy for them.

tree.name: Starcharter Cruise
tree.description:
When Himeko • Nova is in the team, increases the max Technique Points by 3.
After using Technique, enters the "Cruise" state for **1[i]** seconds. Actively using the Technique consumes 2 Technique Points and immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, immediately uses Skill 1 time at the start of each wave.
If attacking a Normal Enemy, immediately defeats them without entering combat. No Technique Points are consumed if no enemies are hit.

tree.name: Whither, the Last and First Men?
tree.description: When Himeko • Nova launches **Assist Skill**, it does not consume **Assist Skill** uses. At the start of the turn, if the **Assist Skill** uses have reached the current cap, Himeko • Nova additionally regenerates **5** Energy.

tree.name: Hark! The Express's Pulse Roars
tree.description: When a **Trailblaze Companions** character other than Himeko • Nova uses **Assist Skill**, that character immediately gains 1 **extra turn** in which they can insert the use of their Ultimate. The **extra turn** gained from **Assist Skill** will not repeatedly trigger this Trace effect.

tree.name: The Silver Rail, Hushed in Antiquity
tree.description: When using Ultimate, immediately gains **3** **"Source Energy."** If the current **"Source Energy"** is **3** or more, when using the "Orbital Annihilation Pulse" attack, the DMG multiplier of "Orbital Annihilation Pulse" against random single enemies increases by **30%**.

ranks.name: That Which We Stride Is the Trailblaze
ranks.description: The number of extra **Assist Skill** uses from Talent additionally increases by **4[i]**. While in the "Companion Protocol: Verdict" state, reduces the number of Ultimate uses required to launch **Assist Skill** by **1[i]**. While in the "Companion Protocol: Decimation" state, reduces the Charge required to launch **Assist Skill** by **2[i]**. When Himeko • Nova launches **Assist Skill**, the number of extra DMG instances increases by **3[i]**.

ranks.name: The Colors We Never Strike
ranks.description: The cap of Himeko • Nova's **Assist Skill** uses increases to 2, and the DMG dealt by Ultimate and **Assist Skill** becomes **1[i]%** of their original DMG. During the "Navigator's Semaphore" state, at the start of each turn , additionally recovers 1 use of **Assist Skill** immediately. When a non-**Trailblaze Companions** character uses **Assist Skill**, the Trace "Hark! The Express's Pulse Roars" now also grants them 1 **extra turn**.

ranks.name: We Who Are Starborn Muse Starward
ranks.description:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. **10**.

ranks.name: Let No Skyward Hand Stay Unheld
ranks.description: When using **Assist Skill** via the Talent "Of Fire and Far Faring," the All-Type RES PEN boost now applies to all allies. And when Himeko • Nova gains this effect, her All-Type RES PEN additionally increases by **1[i]%**.

ranks.name: To Cross the Cosmos and Beyond
ranks.description:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. **15**.

ranks.name: Ours Is the Oath to Sail Starward
ranks.description: Himeko • Nova's Fire **RES PEN** increases by **1[i]%**. The cap of **"Source Energy"** increases to **2[i]**. When an ally uses or launches **Assist Skill**, DMG dealt by **Assist Skill** increases by **3[i]%**, and Himeko • Nova gains 1 **"Source Energy."** When launching "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" during Ultimate, additionally gains 1 **"Source Energy"**. When launching "Orbital Annihilation Pulse," if the current **"Source Energy"** is **4[i]** or more, additionally deals 1 instance of Fire DMG to all enemies, equal to **5[i]%** of Himeko • Nova's ATK.

weapon.name: A Star That Lights the Night
weapon.refinements: The wearer ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's DEF when dealing DMG. When the wearer uses Assist Skill, they regenerate <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy and gain "Sail," lasting for 2 turns and stacking up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s). Each stack of "Sail" increases Assist Skill DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>. When "Sail" reaches <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> stacks, each stack of "Sail" increases Ultimate DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>.

weapon.name: Flickering Stars
weapon.refinements: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. When any ally character consumes a total of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> or more Skill Points in a single turn, the wearer gains "Radiant Crown," lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). While the wearer holds "Radiant Crown," all allies' DMG dealt ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's DEF, and the Skill DMG dealt by the wearer increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Effects of the same type cannot stack.

weapon.name: I Am As You Behold
weapon.refinements: Increases the wearer's ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and Energy Regeneration Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>. When the wearer uses Ultimate, for every 1 Energy consumed, increases the Ultimate DMG dealt this time by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f2]%</unbreak></color>, up to a max increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>. When the wearer enters combat or uses Ultimate, the wearer gains "King's Entertainment," lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). While the wearer holds "King's Entertainment," increases all allies' CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>. Effects of the same type cannot stack.

relics.name: Stranded Express at the Anchorage
relics.description: Sealed within this Planar Sphere is the Astral Express, which once came crashing down here. A silent starscape, a cold and voiceless engine, a trailblazing expedition forged through the fires of war.
story: War rained down from the boundless sky upon Ahatopia. The Nameless, whose Trailblazing had brought them to this world, paused and reached out a hand to a world teetering on the edge of destruction. Against wave after wave of endless monsters, the Astral Express became the spark that ignited the hope of the Ahatopian people. They looked up, and there it was. The Express, like a roaring Giant Dragon tearing a path through the flames and ash, shielding every last civilian in its wake. At the end of that surging tide of war, the Nameless aboard the Express came face to face with the one behind it all: the Demon Lord From Beyond. That dice-headed figure appeared simultaneously across every front, leaving apocalyptic devastation wherever it went. The red-haired girl, imbued with the blood of Destruction, secluded herself in her studio, imagenating Legion after Legion into existence. The greenhorn Nameless fell to unforeseen catastrophe. Battle-hardened Trailblaze pathstriders succumbed to despair... Amid the Demon Lord From Beyond's laughter, amid the tears of the Ahatopians, the Astral Express plummeted like a falling star, howling as it crashed to the ground. The red-haired girl stepped out of her dwelling amid the deafening roar, and saw that the Express upon the earth had become a tower of immeasurable height. The surviving Nameless fought on valiantly, and gazing upon the monsters born of her own brush, she understood destiny's cruel joke. No, even if she could only paint with the might of beasts, she would never again turn her brush against her own people. Instead, she would repaint this scarred and broken world. With every stroke of imagenesis, she would think of those Nameless, their young, tender smiles, their silhouettes pressing onward despite being terrified... "Go where the fire burns. Go where the people cry out..." Eight Supplicants, united in concerted effort: She gathered all their Wishpower and encanvased the world within a scroll, buying Ahatopia a precious moment to breathe. Prosperity began to grace this land, and the family bearing the name of "Murata" spread far and wide. Yet the Express was marooned inside the canvas, never to soar into the cosmos again. A long time later, Ahatopia turned completely upside down, and the people, intoxicated within their arcadia, even forgot the origins of "Murata." Within this desolate World in Canvas, waves beat upon the shore, their waters washing over, echoing beneath a star-filled, desolate night... ...Until another red-haired young woman found that infinite tower.

relics.name: Silver Rails of the Anchorage
relics.description: A girl gazes up at the starry sky, tracing the cosmic star rail of her dreams, aspiring to one day voyage into the boundless future.
story: The Express was the girl's shelter. Amid the abandoned cars, she searched for surviving logs, imagining a day when she, too, would roam the cosmos like the Nameless. She sketched out those dreams. Where the silver rails stretched beyond the horizon, she would pilot the colossal robot "Starblazer," pull into the station at Cygnus, watch fifty-two sunsets and sunrises on an asteroid, dig up fossils buried in the Rosette Nebula... But one glance back at the sanatorium behind her, and the gray of reality would always remind her that the end of the line lay just ahead. Sketching herself in the image of those veteran Navigators, she drew the ideal version of who she wished to be, hoping someone else might walk the path of her dreams in her stead. It seems no one ever imagined that, amid the endlessly recurring Phantasmoon Games, the giant who walks alongside the Express would make such a dreamlike return. They channeled every ounce of their Wishpower to imagenate Pegana's colossal machine, shattering the opponent that had been slaughtering its way through Planarcadia. Nor did anyone know what the girl had offered the gods in exchange, just to draw a little closer to that impossibly distant wish... "The Trailblaze is not a road already laid, but a silver rail yet to be forged." Before her departure, she turned to look back one last time, past the crumbling academy, past the desolate shoreline, past the clamor of the streets, past the hustle and bustle of the alleyways... Stroke by stroke, she had once drawn a trail that wound around the stars, sketched a passage that spanned the firmament. An invisible star rail, extending from the depths of a shattered world of paint, slowly reaching toward the brilliant cosmos. She lifted her gaze. The cosmos remained mute, yet she could hear a beckoning from deep within her heart. "Don't be afraid. Walk on." A millennium ago, the Nameless arrived to the sound of a whistle, and made their sacrifice upon the earth of Ahatopia. A millennium later, she stood quietly at the edge where earth met sky, and sounded the Express's departure whistle once more. The Express's lights illuminated the night sky, and fell upon the eyes of Destruction in the distance. She did not know what lay at the end of the silver rail, just as she knew nothing of her destiny. But the Trailblaze has never changed. Board the Express. Press onward. That's all there is to it.

relics.name: Central Synapse of the Life Sciences Institute
relics.description: Encapsulated within the Planar Sphere is the core sector of the Life Sciences Institute, where researchers act like nodes in a neural network, continuously generating inspiration and feedback through industrialized workflows.
story: Central Synapse of the Life Sciences Institute

"If your ambition rivals that of a genius, and you know how to create value through innovation, then you belong in the Technology Department! Join forces with the Intelligentsia Guild!" Every researcher who successfully makes it into the Life Sciences Institute remembers the exact moment the director's finger pointed their way. The vision of "success" sending shivers down their spine, the staggering R&D budgets making their head spin. In this research institute jointly established by the Technology Department and the Intelligentsia Guild, thinking is the most important work, and inspiration is a researcher's most irreplaceable asset. Scholars peer through microscopes to deconstruct and refactor the building blocks of universal life, then tip the scales of the market, jotting down in their reports exactly how many pounds and ounces they are worth. Maximizing results at all costs tends to send academia into overdrive: a relentless surge of audacious experiments that constantly skirt the gray areas of ethics. Cross-species hybridization, gene editing, species creation... Every living thing in the universe is fair game for the Life Sciences Institute. There used to be a joke passed around among the staff: When you walk past a darkened laboratory, you never know whether the one opening the door next will be the researcher... or the research subject. Among the many widely circulated rumors and legends, the head of the Technology Department, Yabuli, has always been one of the central figures. As an elusive bigshot, everyone's heard her name, yet precious few know what the major experiment she spearheads actually entails. People gaze toward the core focus of the Life Sciences Institute with a mix of awe and trepidation, and every violent tremor that erupts from within sparks a fresh wave of feverish speculation. The Life Sciences Institute never responds to such questions. Beneath the surface, undercurrents churn, while researchers contribute their ruminations day after day. Until the collision of inspiration strikes a spark, and outlandish fantasies are forged into reality through fierce debate. Only then does everyone breathe a collective sigh of relief. Even with closed eyes, they can already see the cosmic tomorrow reshaped by their own hands.

relics.name: Peripheral Conduits of the Life Sciences Institute
relics.description: A production line for the mass manufacture of artificial life. The conveyor belt rocks gently back and forth, and there is always some creation that mistakes it for a mother and a cradle.
story: Peripheral Conduits of the Life Sciences Institute

Ever since the IPC successfully salvaged Planarcadia, "Wishpower" has become one of the hottest research topics at the Life Sciences Institute. After years of study, simulating Wishpower-rich environments, and even producing wispae, is no longer a difficult issue for the Life Sciences Institute. On the bustling production line, a newborn wispae can see nothing but the hurried, shuffling boots of researchers and a conveyor belt stretching toward the infinite beyond. This is where it was born, and this is the industrialized assembly line to which it will devote its entire life in service of the Interastral Peace Corporation. The patent documents of the Life Sciences Institute describe the "nurturing" process as follows: Wispae, who transport goods on assembly lines year-round, undergo rotational balance training in centrifugal containers during their unconscious cultivation period; the wispae responsible for stepping on buttons to provide production power can potentially reach a bounce height of over fifty times their own size if stimulated by a mild electric current; and those rare wispae with exceptional talent may even be further conjured into highly valuable products... A massive amount of consumables is glossed over in a single stroke, and the researcher concludes at the end: "Nurtured by the IPC, every seemingly weak wispae will transform and become the highest quality, most valuable laborer and commodity." The Life Sciences Institute housed the wispae's work and living quarters within elegant glass enclosures, showcasing them as a crowning achievement of new-era bioengineering. Grateful for the IPC's benevolence, these tame wispae came to believe that here, "you were born to labor," and that here, "the humblest imagenae keep the grand Life Sciences Institute running." Some researchers liked to lean against the glass and watch them whenever fatigue set in. They would see swarms of wispae converging in waves, see the ceaseless churn of conveyor belts rolling toward them... And then, the person pressed against the glass might catch a glimpse of their own reflection staring back.

relicSets.name: Fallen Star Anchorage
relicSets.two: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by **8%**. When entering combat, if the wearer and another teammate are both Trailblaze Companions characters, increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by **32%**.
relicSets.twopc: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by **1[i]%**. When entering combat, if the wearer and another teammate are both Trailblaze Companions characters, increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by **2[i]%**.

relicSets.name: Cosmic Life Sciences Institute
relicSets.two: When entering combat, if the wearer's Max Energy is greater than or equal to **200**, for every 1 excess point, increases the wearer's DMG dealt by **2[f1]%**, up to a max increase of **32%**.
relicSets.twopc: When entering combat, if the wearer's Max Energy is greater than or equal to **1[i]**, for every 1 excess point, increases the wearer's DMG dealt by **2[f1]%**, up to a max increase of **3[i]%**.
